suite.name: Cadastro

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: CT01 - Cadastro aprovado com todos os campos preenchidos

kw.name: Acessar Página de Cadastro
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu nome']' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu nome']' did not appear in 10 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu nome']' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.

test.doc: Preenche todos os campos e verifica que o cadastro é aceito.
test.status: Element 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu nome']' did not appear in 10 seconds.

test.name: CT02 - Cadastro recusado com campos vazios

kw.name: Acessar Página de Cadastro
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu nome']' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu nome']' did not appear in 10 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu nome']' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Element Should Be Disabled
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is disabled.

test.doc: Deixa os campos vazios e verifica que o cadastro é recusado.
test.status: Element 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Digite seu nome']' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: Testes de cadastro — CT01 (campos preenchidos) e CT02 (campo vazio)
